brief_html: Contains encryption result and data to be sent to Battle.net.
format:
(BOOLEAN) Result
(UINT32) Client Token
(UINT32) CD-Key Length
(UINT32) CD-Key Product Value
(UINT32) CD-Key Public Value
(UINT32) Unknown (0)
(UINT32) [5] CD-Key Hash*
remarks_html:
Contains encryption result and data to be sent to Battle.net.

* Data for SID_AUTH_CHECK
